note: Reconstructed EMC patient-derived-model drug screens + compound->target->exposure annotation (source of truth for dist/emc_drug_screens.tsv and dist/emc_compound_target_exposure.tsv). CRITICAL medical-integrity corrections applied after primary verification (2026-07-11): (1) HDM201/siremadlin is NOT corroborated as a USZ hit and is recorded as a strategy-doc claim that did NOT survive verification; (2) the USZ combination result is 'dose-dependent additive AND synergistic effects in BOTH models' for carfilzomib+doxorubicin and carfilzomib+venetoclax -- NOT a clean 'synergistic in one / additive in the other' split; (3) the USZ screen is 17 chemotherapeutics + a targeted medium-throughput panel, not literally '40 drugs'. Verification is abstract/search-snippet level because the egress proxy blocked PubMed/PMC/Springer/EuropePMC full text; IC50 numbers were NOT retrievable and are marked 'not_reported_retrievable'. exposure fields are qualitative field-standard notes; specific unbound-Cmax numbers are 'to_populate' rather than invented.
verification_context: UPDATED 2026-07-11 (CI via EuropePMC): NCC-2025 hits (brigatinib/panobinostat/romidepsin, 221 drugs) are now PRIMARY-ABSTRACT confirmed (Iwata abstract names them explicitly). USZ-2023 hit identities are NOT: the Bangerter EuropePMC abstract is generic ('novel anti-cancer drug sensitivities including potential synergistic combinations') and does NOT name carfilzomib/PU-H71/HDM201 -- those remain search-snippet reads of the non-OA full text/figures. HDM201 stays uncorroborated. IC50 numbers still not retrievable. Re-confirm USZ hits + IC50s from full text before publication.

screens.readout: qualitative sensitivity bands (high/good/moderate); numeric IC50s not_reported_retrievable
IC50 (low-IC50 hits named; numeric values not_reported_retrievable)

hits.polypharmacology: highly selective proteasome inhibitor (cleaner than bortezomib)
hits.result: strongest single-agent hit; high sensitivity in BOTH USZ models
hits.achievable_free_exposure: verbatim FDA-label PK in _generated/panel-exposure.json (DailyMed; C023). Short plasma exposure vs sustained-engagement need = the solid-tumor window question
hits.solid_tumor_caveat: Proteasome inhibitors have historically performed far better in hematologic than solid tumors (penetration + window). A potent 3D-sphere hit must be checked against achievable tumor exposure.
hits.notes: Anchor of the proteostasis-chromatin hypothesis (strategy Rank 2).

hits.solid_tumor_caveat: Consistent with the clinical anthracycline signal in EMC (Stacchiotti 2013: 4/10 PR). Not a unique EMC vulnerability.
hits.notes: Clinically-anchored comparator; combination partner with carfilzomib.

hits.achievable_free_exposure: verbatim FDA-label PK in _generated/panel-exposure.json (DailyMed; C023), where an approved label exists
hits.solid_tumor_caveat: HSP90 inhibitors have a long history of narrow windows / on-target toxicity in solid tumors.
hits.engagement_assay: HSP70 induction (pharmacodynamic marker of HSP90 inhibition)
hits.notes: Supports the proteostasis axis alongside carfilzomib (independent node).

hits.polypharmacology: MULTIKINASE / polypharmacologic -- activity is NOT proof of ALK dependency
hits.solid_tumor_caveat: Requires target deconvolution (selective ALK inhibitor + genetic perturbation + phosphoproteomics + rescue) before any ALK claim. EMC has no known ALK rearrangement.
hits.engagement_assay: phosphoproteomics of candidate kinases; kinome profiling
hits.notes: EXPLICIT anti-pattern guard: do not read brigatinib activity as ALK addiction (single model, one screen).

hits.achievable_free_exposure: verbatim FDA-label PK in _generated/panel-exposure.json (DailyMed; C023), where an approved label exists
hits.solid_tumor_caveat: pan-HDAC inhibitors can produce broad, non-specific transcriptional toxicity; class-vs-idiosyncrasy must be distinguished.
hits.notes: Chromatin node of the proteostasis-chromatin axis; convergent with romidepsin (same screen, same class).

hits.achievable_free_exposure: verbatim FDA-label PK in _generated/panel-exposure.json (DailyMed; C023), where an approved label exists
hits.solid_tumor_caveat: class-I HDACi; same broad-toxicity caveat but a useful class-vs-compound control against panobinostat.
hits.notes: Two HDAC hits (pan + class-I) in the SAME model = effect tracks the target (HDAC), not one chemical -- the strongest single-screen convergence signal.

combinations.result: dose-dependent additive AND synergistic effects reported in BOTH USZ models
combinations.verification: VERIFIED_abstract (combination tested); per-model synergy-vs-additive split UNVERIFIED
combinations.correction_note: The strategy brief's 'synergistic in one model / additive in the other' is NOT supported by the abstract, which attributes both effects to both models. Do not restate the split as fact.

combinations.result: dose-dependent additive AND synergistic effects reported in BOTH USZ models
combinations.correction_note: Venetoclax (BCL2 inhibitor) was part of the USZ combination panel -- an apoptosis-priming partner not emphasized in the strategy brief; worth carrying into the validation panel.

did_not_survive_verification.claim: HDM201 / siremadlin (MDM2/MDM4 inhibitor) was a top USZ hit
did_not_survive_verification.detail: No search/abstract read of Bangerter 2023 surfaced HDM201/siremadlin as an EMC hit; one summary explicitly noted it was not in the EMC screening results. Recorded here so the MDM2/MDM4 node is treated as a hypothesis, NOT an EMC screen hit, until full-text confirms. This also removes the p53/MDM2 leg from the 'convergent' story unless independently supported.
did_not_survive_verification.action: Down-weight MDM2/MDM4 in the evidence score; keep as mechanistic candidate only.

did_not_survive_verification.detail: Paper reports 17 chemotherapeutics + a separate targeted medium-throughput panel. Use the precise description.

did_not_survive_verification.claim: Numeric IC50 values for any hit
did_not_survive_verification.detail: No IC50/EC50 numbers were retrievable from accessible (abstract-level) sources for either screen. Marked not_reported_retrievable; obtain from full text/supplement.
